privileged_info_summary: The task uses Apache Commons CLI 1.6.0 (released October 26, 2018), a real public open source project from the Apache Software Foundation, downloaded from GitHub. The project directory is /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/commons-cli. The required commit message is 'Initial commit: Import Apache Commons CLI library'. The .gitignore must exclude at minimum: target/, *.class, .settings/, .classpath, and .project. Note: The metadata field 'required_ignore_patterns' is incomplete, listing only target/, *.class, and .settings/, while the task description requires five patterns including .classpath and .project.
